name: Fried Walnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour boiling water over the nuts and let stand for 2 to 3 minutes.
2. Drain well.
3. Transfer to a baking sheet.
4. Sprinkle with sugar and mix well.
5. Spread in a single layer and let stand overnight to dry.
6. Heat oil in a wok or skillet until very hot.
7. Add nuts in small batches and fry for 1 to 2 minutes, turning occasionally until golden brown.
8. Remove from oil and drain on a rack.
9. Store in a tightly covered container in a cool, dry place.
(Oil can be strained and used several more times for this recipe.)
10. Makes 1 1/2 cups.
